news.t: Invesco's Larosiliere Talks Income, Yield in 2026

overview.description: The Invesco Ultra Short Duration ETF (GSY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks to outperform the Barclays Capital 1-3 Month U.S. Treasury Bill Index by investing in a diverse portfolio of investment-grade securities. GSY was launched on Feb 12, 2008 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco's Larosiliere Talks Income, Yield in 2026
data.text: Fixed income is once again a place of exciting opportunities for investors. From U.S. and ex-U.S.
